assertions.description: The analyzer correctly identifies D1-D4 as a WS2812E-V5 chain of length 4, with data_in_net '__unnamed_35', protocol 'single-wire (WS2812)', and estimated current 240mA (4 × 60mA). The associated level-shifter MOSFET Q2 and data resistor R15 (820R) are also correctly linked.

INCORRECT: The transistor circuit analysis for Q2 (2N7002 level shifter) shows gate_net as '+3V3' (correct — this is a source-follower level shifter with gate tied to supply). However, gate_driver_ics lists U4 (XC6206P332MR LDO regulator) and U5 (SHT40-CD1B-R3 humidity sensor) multiple times as gate drivers, simply because they are connected to the +3V3 rail. These are power supply and sensor ICs, not gate drivers. Only U1 (nRF52840) is a plausible signal driver here, and even that interpretation is debatable since the gate is statically biased.
